item.title: RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 4min Evan Williams has been sentenced to three years in prison, following his conviction last
item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 4min Evan Williams has been sentenced to three years in prison, following his conviction last month for causing grievous bodily harm with intent
Williams attacked 72-year-old Martin Dandridge, believing he was a lamper one evening in December 2024, leaving Dandridge with a broken arm De racingpost.com 491

item.title: irishracing: irishracing.com @irishracing · 22min The Irish Angle team look back on last week’s @AintreeRaces Grand National meetin
item.description: irishracing.com @irishracing · 22min The Irish Angle team look back on last week’s @AintreeRaces Grand National meeting. In this clip they discuss Paul Townend’s ride on Gold Dancer in the William Hill Mildmay Novices´ Chase 1 335

item.title:
AtTheRaces: At The Races @AtTheRaces · 28min "He's extremely fresh and well!"
@bishopcharlie12 provided a positive update on Clas
item.description:
At The Races @AtTheRaces · 28min "He's extremely fresh and well!"
@bishopcharlie12 provided a positive update on Classic hope Zavateri who is set to make his return in the Greenham at @NewburyRacing on Saturday... 2 1 8 1 mil

item.title:
AtTheRaces: At The Races @AtTheRaces · 38min "He's just a freak of a character!"
Caballo De Mar improved at an astronomical rate in
